case_title: GILLESPIE, TYRONE W. AKA TY GILLESPIE vs. HAWTHORN, ROBIN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TAYLOR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAWTHORN, ROBIN RODRIGUEZ, TAYLOR COURT ORDERS JDMT FOR PLTF AGAINST TAYLOR TODRIQUEZ PER STIP & AGAINST ROBIN HAWTHORN AFTER ENTRY OF DEFAULT FOR REST & POSS OF PREMISES AT 1779 FOLSOM #1 & FORFEITURE OF LEASE. EVICTIION IS STAYED AS TO TAYLOR RODRIQUEZ ONLY TO MIDNIGHT 5-15-95, IF SHE COMPLIES W/ SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JDMT AGAINST TAYLOR RODRIQUEZ ONLY FOR $5850 BACK RENT & DAMAGES, $532.43 UNPAID UTILITIES THRU 2-28-95, & ADD'L UTILITIES THRU 5-15-95 TO BE DETERMINED. JDMT AGAINST ROBIN HAWTHORN ONLY FOR $3769.71 BACK RENT & DAMAGES. COSTS PER COST BILL.
